description: Represents an application graph trace link for an application graph node generated from the different logs collected by the app agents.

allow.description: True if this link is a connection that was allowed, false if denied.
allow.title: allow

dstNodeID.description: The unique identifier of the application graph node which constitutes the destination for this link.
dstNodeID.title: dstNodeID

encrypted.description: True if this link is a connection which is using encryption.
encrypted.title: encrypted

findings.description: The findings categorized by type detected for this link.
findings.title: findings

insecureEncryption.description: True if this link is a connection using insecure encryption (e.g., TLS 1.0 or 1.1).
insecureEncryption.title: insecureEncryption

log.description: The optional log data for this link in the application graph. If not provided, the log can be queried from Loki using the log timestamp and log hash.
log.title: log

logHash.description: The hash of the log entry for this link in the application graph. This can be used to query the log from Loki.
logHash.title: logHash

logTimestamp.description: The timestamp in nanoseconds of the log entry for this link in the application graph. This can be used to query the log from Loki.
logTimestamp.title: logTimestamp

processingNode.description: Identifies if either the source node or the destination node were responsible for processing that resulted in this link.
processingNode.title: processingNode

spanID.description: The span ID that is being referenced.
spanID.title: spanID

spanNumber.description: The number of the span in the trace that denotes the logical order number of the span within the trace.
spanNumber.title: spanNumber

srcNodeID.description: The unique identifier of the application graph node which constitutes the source for this link.
srcNodeID.title: srcNodeID

type.description: The type of the proxy roundtrip. Input represents a request, Output a response.
type.title: type

username.description: The optional username associated with this link.
username.title: username

title: AppGraphTraceLink
